can_update.story_title: The Wolf-Lord Who Could Not Walk
can_update.folder_name: DONE_A Broken Alpha _Goodnovel - The Wolf-Lord Who Could Not Walk

server.synopsis:
Roderic Voorhees has been Alpha of the Ravenwood Ridge Pack since he was twenty-four, and he has run it from a wheelchair longer than that. A drunk-driving accident cost him his legs at fourteen, and a vicious mate-rejection at an Alpha conference five years later ripped what was left of his soul. Now he wakes in his big, quiet pack house in the North Cascades and tells himself the empty seat across from him is fine. His son Eli, his Beta Brogan, his Commander Donovan, the cook Marisol who will not let him push her plate away — these are what he has, and these are enough. The Goddess, he knows, is finished giving him what he asked for.

He is wrong.

On a routine swim with Brogan along the river that splits his territory, a body floats into them. A young man, naked, beaten to within a breath of dying, scarred from the bones out. The moment Roderic's fingers brush the cold cheek, the dead-quiet in his chest breaks open: tingles. The Goddess has not been finished with him. He has a second mate.

Cormac is the body in the water. For eighteen years, he has been the Ironpeak Pack's slave — picked up as a frightened six-year-old, dropped in a basement, taught to clean and cook and bleed. The Alpha used a whip on him; the Alpha's youngest son Pearcey used his mouth. The day the Alpha decided to kill him, Cormac chose the cliff over the floor. He let his wolf Frost run, jumped into the river, and did not expect to wake up.

He wakes up two weeks later, in a soft bed, in a strange Alpha's room, with a strange Alpha's head resting on his arm. Roderic is everything Cormac has been taught to fear — large, heavily inked, obviously powerful, obviously a wolf-lord. But Roderic does not yell. Roderic is wearing a wheelchair, and Roderic is the gentlest creature Cormac has ever been close to, and when their hands touch, Cormac feels for the first time in his life what the bond is supposed to feel like.

The mate bond would already be enough story. It is not the only story. Roderic carries the weight of one rejection that nearly killed him; the second rejection, if it comes, will finish the job. Cormac carries trauma so old it has knit itself into the marrow of his bones — and he has spent eighteen years learning that any man who reaches for him intends to hurt him. Pearcey is going to come looking for the slave who ran. The pack-house at Ravenwood is full of people Cormac has never met. The world outside the bedroom door is going to ask both of them whether the pack will accept a Luna who was once a slave, and an Alpha who cannot stand up to defend him.

This is a romance about how two broken people become brave enough to be loved. It is dark in the places it has to be — the abuse is on the page, the slurs are on the page, the rejection is on the page — and softer than you expect everywhere else. Roderic is steady. Cormac is observant. The pack is loud. Frost is patient. The Goddess, it turns out, gives second chances when she gives them at all.

server.synopsis: Dumped by her popular boyfriend on their two-year anniversary, seventeen-year-old Isla Brennan gets drunk at a party and falls into the arms of Damien Vance — Hartford's most ruthless young billionaire. Three weeks later, ten pregnancy tests say the same thing. A secret wedding in Lisbon turns her into Mrs. Vance overnight, but her new husband still has a girlfriend, his parents hate her, and a charming stranger keeps calling her querida.

server.push_content: In our hood, that confession gets one of us killed.
server.synopsis: Marcus has spent two months hiding what he feels for the boy next door. In a neighborhood where being gay can cost a guy his life, loving his sister's best friend, Kieran, is a death sentence he refuses to say out loud. But Kieran is hiding the same secret, and Marcus's nosy little sister Imani has already seen it on their faces. One fake date, one stolen confession, and one kiss on a public bus changes everything.

One disastrous party ends with her best friend's cruel words and a near-fatal step into the road, where a cold, gorgeous stranger's car nearly kills her. He vanishes without a name. Then Damien Voss reappears, hunting her down, dropping his card, knowing her address she never gave. He is the city's richest playboy, and he wants her. Worse, he owns the very university she is trying to hide in.

server.synopsis: Devon Halloran spent twenty-eight years chasing her mother's smile. One dinner cracked the family open — Vivienne's icy tongue, Garrett threatening to walk, Devon out the door by morning with Connor in tow. Vivienne sat alone with a secret heavier than the daughter she'd never quite loved: Devon was adopted, signed for two days before the nurses placed her into those arms. The only version of Devon she could control just walked out.

can_update.story_title: Theo Doesn't Share
can_update.folder_name: DONE_Daddy _God - Theo Doesn't Share

server.synopsis:
Seventeen-year-old Caleb has just been thrown out of his own house. His father caught him with another boy and decided he doesn't have a gay son anymore. With nowhere to go, no friends to call, and a Twitter alter account as his only safety net, Caleb posts the most desperate thing he's ever typed: a place to crash near Bayfront, anything goes.

Damon answers fast. Hot, hung, dominant, and exactly the kind of trouble Caleb thought he wanted for the night. But when Caleb climbs into the car at the pickup spot, the man behind the wheel isn't Damon. It's Theo Vargas, twenty-nine, CEO and underwear model, Damon's cousin — sent to fetch a stranger as a quick favor and now staring at the same boy he scrolled past on Twitter the night before.

Theo brings Caleb home. He cooks. He asks questions. He pulls a towel off slow on purpose. And by the time Gone Girl hits its credits and Caleb steals a first kiss he's never given anyone, Theo's already on the phone with his cousin telling Damon to back off — because Theo doesn't share.

Caleb came looking for a bed for one night. He's about to find out that some men keep what they pick up.

A slow-burn-meets-fast-fall age-gap M/M romance about a kicked-out boy, a wealthy cousin who claims him by accident, and the night that turns "fuck buddy" into something neither of them was supposed to want.

folder_values.push_title: 🏢 Dad threw me out at seventeen
folder_values.push_content: I tweeted nudes for a bed. A billionaire kept me.
folder_values.synopsis: Seventeen-year-old Caleb has just been thrown out of his own house. His father caught him with another boy and decided he doesn't have a gay son anymore. With nowhere to go, no friends to call, and a Twitter alter account as his only safety net, Caleb posts the most desperate thing he's ever typed: a place to crash near Bayfront, anything goes. Damon answers fast. Hot, hung, dominant, and exactly the kind of trouble Caleb thought he wanted for the night. But when Caleb climbs into the car at the pickup spot, the man behind the wheel isn't Damon. It's Theo Vargas, twenty-nine, CEO and underwear model, Damon's cousin — sent to fetch a stranger as a quick favor and now staring at the same boy he scrolled past on Twitter the night before. Theo brings Caleb home. He cooks. He asks questions. He pulls a towel off slow on purpose. And by the time Gone Girl hits its credits and Caleb steals a first kiss he's never given anyone, Theo's already on the phone with his cousin telling Damon to back off — because Theo doesn't share. Caleb came looking for a bed for one night. He's about to find out that some men keep what they pick up. A slow-burn-meets-fast-fall age-gap M/M romance about a kicked-out boy, a wealthy cousin who claims him by accident, and the night that turns "fuck buddy" into something neither of them was supposed to want.

The pair come hand in hand or not at all. Dorian walks them to a hospital, and three days later he comes back.

Mateo guarded his heart since he was twelve. Dante intends to be the first to slip past it.

server.push_content: He hired me to fetch his coffee. He doesn't know I'm an heiress.
server.synopsis: Talia Brennan buried her own name the night her family fell apart. Now she answers to Elena Reed, an orphan with nothing, hiding even from her billionaire brother. A job drops her beside Damon Vale, the coldest CEO in the city, a man who burns through assistants and swore off love after a cheating ex. She talks back. He should fire her. Instead, Mr Frost is starting to thaw, and a borrowed name was never built to last.

That same night Joi, the best friend Tia has been quietly in love with since freshman year, peels her shirt off, sees the brand, and asks for the truth.

Her CEO Inessa Volkov cannot stand her — until five partners push Hazel into a promotion neither woman expected. Late reports, a billionaire visit, and a club bathroom collision flip every workplace rule between them. When Inessa offers a quiet bargain to keep Hazel's job, Hazel realises the woman she fears may have been watching her all along.

can_update.story_title: Caught in His Headlights
can_update.folder_name: DONE_Her Dad My Daddy_wp - Caught in His Headlights

server.push_content: Then he found me again and offered to help with my problem.
server.synopsis:
EN (78 words):
Soren is twenty, broke, sharp-tongued, and allergic to good decisions. One rainy night he nearly dies under the wheels of a stranger's car, and the stranger, Dario, is older, rich, and impossible to forget. Returning a borrowed jacket drags Soren into Dario's orbit, and a chance meeting at a kink club ends with a quiet promise: Soren will be his. But Dario is hiding a grief that could undo them both before the story even begins.

VI (110 words):
Soren hai mươi tuổi, túng thiếu, miệng lưỡi sắc bén và luôn đưa ra những quyết định tệ hại. Một đêm mưa, cậu suýt chết dưới bánh xe của một người lạ, và người đó, Dario, lớn tuổi hơn, giàu có và khiến cậu không thể nào quên. Việc trả lại chiếc áo khoác mượn kéo Soren vào quỹ đạo của Dario, và một lần tình cờ gặp nhau ở câu lạc bộ kín kết thúc bằng một lời hứa khẽ khàng: Soren sẽ thuộc về anh. Nhưng Dario đang giấu một nỗi đau có thể hủy hoại cả hai trước khi câu chuyện kịp bắt đầu.

Then her stepbrother Treve comes home from alpha training, drives his eyes over her like she's no one's sister, and three Bodmin wolves come up off the heather above Wheal Trezise to drag her back to her birth-father's pack. By midnight she's bleeding from a slate-shard gash, watching Treve lick her ribs clean, praying her mother never finds out which mate she actually wants.

Her bride is Seraphine Whitlock, the older, colder CEO the city calls the Ice Queen. But forced closeness has a way of cracking armor, and one stolen moment at the gala threatens to burn the whole arrangement down.

Fate refuses to leave them alone, a tipsy first-class flight, a London restaurant, a supermarket aisle, a quiet Marylebone bookshop. He doesn't smile. She doesn't stop talking. Then she drops a hand-drawn tulip and he keeps it framed on his desk. Neither planned to fall, but the city keeps putting her in his path.

The catch: he is quietly in love with twelve boys from the volleyball club, each one marked by a different petal color in his throat. With twenty-nine days left, one train ride, and a golden sun necklace for the boy he loves the loudest, he starts writing his goodbye.

server.push_content: Married the bodyguard. He wired a million the same day.
server.synopsis: Sloane begs the father who threw out her family for money to save her dying mother. Her stepmother agrees on one condition: marry Ronan Strait, the family's quiet bodyguard. Sloane kneels in the lobby. He says yes. Ronan, a hidden billionaire, wires a million to the hospital. But the stepmother sabotages the surgery, a bar-shift trap delivers Sloane to the doctor who refused her, and Ronan kicks the door off its latch.

Now she wakes in the car on the night of the crash, every memory intact, the proof of her sister's crime burning in her chest. This time, she takes everything back.

server.synopsis: Briella Quinn loved her cushy job as Owen Holloway's personal secretary, until he transferred her to his best friend, ice-cold billionaire Roan Caldwell. Roan barks orders, banishes the use of his first name, makes her drink his coffee while he watches, and drags her onto his fake date list. She is supposed to hate him. So why does her stomach flip every time he says her full name? And why does he watch her like she belongs to him already?

folder_values.push_title: 🏢 My new boss promised me hell
folder_values.push_content: He kissed my hand, then told his family I'm his girlfriend.
folder_values.synopsis: Brielle Carver took the assistant job to survive, not to fall for her boss. Lucas Reyes is the city's coldest billionaire, and on day one he leans in and promises her hell. He drags her to a red carpet as his date, throws punches over another man's hands on her, and locks her in his mansion overnight. Then he tells his family they're dating. Brielle never agreed to be his girlfriend. Lucas isn't the type to ask twice.

Then a paparazzi kiss between Damon and his rival socialite hits the front page, and Avery learns her heart was never as paper-thin as the contract. A single text rips it open. Her first love is back. And he is Damon's brother.

server.synopsis: Reckless tech billionaire Easton Wilder thinks nothing can touch him until a gift bag lands on his desk: a positive pregnancy test and a letter demanding five million dollars from an ex he cannot even name. His father's answer is Knox Cole, a maddeningly handsome bodyguard who moves into his mansion and refuses to play by Easton's rules. As a second threat arrives and old secrets surface, the line between protector and temptation begins to blur.

server.push_content: They called me a worthless fool. They have no idea what I am.
server.synopsis: They called her the family disgrace, a cheat with no talent, and threw her out of the Calloway dynasty for good. Seraphine did not argue. She walked into Ashmoor, the city's roughest district, and into the quiet home of the grandfather they pretended did not exist. But the discarded daughter is no fool. She has hidden her brilliance for years, and now, with nothing left to lose, she has finally stopped pretending. Let them all watch what she becomes.

server.synopsis: On Vargnatt, Sigrid finds her chosen Alpha-heir Halvar fated to her own half-sister Ingrid. She flees the Vargheim seat to the Glacial Moon-Pool, where Skuggwald vargr corner her — until a faceless stranger claims her under the Bondmoon. By dawn his bondmark seals invisibly inside her throat. Her father swears to kill her unless an Alpha takes her at the Bond Concord. Then Bjorn — the fjord-clans' most ruthless Wolf-Lord — picks her, sight unseen, his mate already marked.

can_update.story_title: The Tycoon Who Pretended to Be Poor
can_update.folder_name: DONE_The Hidden Billionaire_wp - The Tycoon Who Pretended to Be Poor

server.push_content: He drove a cheap Honda so I'd think he was broke.
server.synopsis:
# Synopsis - The Tycoon Who Pretended to Be Poor

EN:

Cora pours coffee at a tiny downtown café and has no clue that the quiet customer with the cold blue eyes owns half the skyline. Renzo Castellanos calls himself a small business owner. He hides the Pagani, the penthouse, the empire. He even hides his name. He swears he will not fall for anyone. Then Cora laughs at a baby's lisp, fires back at his rude friend, and stops his cold heart. The billionaire decides she will be his.

VI:

Cora pha cà phê tại một quán nhỏ ở trung tâm và không hề biết rằng vị khách trầm lặng với đôi mắt xanh lạnh kia sở hữu nửa thành phố. Renzo Castellanos tự nhận là chủ doanh nghiệp nhỏ. Anh giấu chiếc Pagani, căn penthouse, cả một đế chế. Anh thậm chí giấu cả tên thật. Anh thề sẽ không bao giờ rung động trước ai. Rồi Cora bật cười trước tiếng ngọng của một đứa bé, đáp trả gã bạn thô lỗ của anh, và khiến trái tim lạnh giá ấy ngừng đập. Vị tỷ phú quyết định cô sẽ thuộc về anh.

can_update.folder_name: DONE_The Male Omega's Awaking _Gd - The Hidden Alpha Who Knew My Name

server.synopsis: For two years, Rowan kept the secret that Drew, the alpha's son, was his fated mate. Then Drew was claimed for an alliance bride, and Rowan ran north into the pines under a new name. The hidden Cedarmoor Pack took him in, taught him to fight, gave him a place. Then the alpha, a male omega like him, leaned across his desk, smiled, and said the one thing nobody at Cedarmoor was supposed to know: his real name.

server.synopsis: Vance Caradoc thinks fresh starts are a scam. Forced into the Free Arts Society for credits, he picks up a random brush and four strangers, photographer Bram, sculptor Iver, guitarist Riff, model Wren. Between an evening waiter shift, his hookup Drex on a bike, and old cafe owner Greta who still knows his full name, Vance keeps everyone at arm's length. Then Riff offers a hundred bucks an hour for tutoring, and Vance signs a deal he already regrets.

server.synopsis: Bennett Vance, a workaholic CEO, finds a newborn on his doorstep. The note from his vanished ex names him as the father. Drowning in feedings and silence, he hires Theo Halloran, a twenty-two-year-old foster-grown nanny who once raised a baby sister he lost. As Theo quiets the crying and the house, Bennett feels something he had buried with her: hope. But Theo carries his own grief, his own ex, and a future he stopped wishing for.

Cassian only wants to walk away.

server.push_content: He hired me to fetch his coffee. He doesn't know I'm an heiress.
server.synopsis: Talia Brennan buried her own name the night her family fell apart. Now she answers to Elena Reed, an orphan with nothing, hiding even from her billionaire brother. A job drops her beside Damon Vale, the coldest CEO in the city, a man who burns through assistants and swore off love after a cheating ex. She talks back. He should fire her. Instead, Mr Frost is starting to thaw, and a borrowed name was never built to last.

folder_values.push_title: 🥂 I lied my way to him
folder_values.push_content: Then a box of lingerie arrived. The card asked: know his secrets?
folder_values.synopsis: Cora Whitfield has a degree, an empty bank account, and a borrowed dress that does not fit. At her rich friend's wedding she wanders into a private room and meets Damien Vance, the coldest, most beautiful billionaire in the city, a man who treats her like a thief and walks her out the door. She should forget him. She cannot. Weeks later, broke and about to move back home, Cora is ambushed at a luxury dinner where her friends try to land her a job as Damien's assistant. He refuses, cruelly, to her face. So Cora does the only thing her pride will allow: she applies anyway, under a false name, and dares him to turn her down again. He hires her. He moves her into his world. And the rules she writes for herself, do not get close, do not believe the gossip, do not sleep with the boss, start to crack the moment he looks at her. Then a box of expensive lingerie arrives with no sender, and a single line on a hidden card: don't you want to know his secrets? Someone wants Cora inside Damien's hidden life. A vengeful journalist who once shared his bed. A sleazy associate who hints at a private society. And a sister, wrecked and dangerous, who knows exactly why his wife really left. At a glittering launch party in his grand country house, all of it comes apart at once, and the secret Cora was warned about walks down the stairs in front of everyone.

folder_value.title: 🥂 I lied my way to him
folder_value.content: Then a box of lingerie arrived. The card asked: know his secrets?

server_value.title: 🏢 I work for the coldest billionaire
server_value.content: He hired me to fetch his coffee. He doesn't know I'm an heiress.

differences.server_value: Talia Brennan buried her own name the night her family fell apart. Now she answers to Elena Reed, an orphan with nothing, hiding even from her billionaire brother. A job drops her beside Damon Vale, the coldest CEO in the city, a man who burns through assistants and swore off love after a cheating ex. She talks back. He should fire her. Instead, Mr Frost is starting to thaw, and a borrowed name was never built to last.

server.push_content: He owns my building. Two years ago, I broke his wedding.
server.synopsis:
EN (78 words):

Seventeen-year-old Wren stumbles on a garden conversation at the wedding of the year and triggers a runaway bride. The jilted heir, Adrian Vance, is destroyed; Wren carries the guilt no one knows she owns. Two years later she lands in Portland for a quiet exchange semester, only to be attacked her first night in a luxury condo — and the lethal CEO who races home to face her is the same man she watched cry alone.

VI:

Wren mười bảy tuổi tình cờ nghe lén một cuộc trò chuyện trong vườn ngay tại đám cưới được mong chờ nhất năm, khiến cô dâu bỏ trốn. Adrian Vance, người thừa kế bị bỏ rơi trước bàn thờ, suy sụp tan nát, còn Wren âm thầm gánh nỗi day dứt không ai biết. Hai năm sau, cô đến Portland cho một học kỳ trao đổi yên ả, nhưng ngay đêm đầu tiên đã bị tấn công trong căn hộ hạng sang — và vị CEO sắc lạnh lao về để đối diện cô lại chính là người đàn ông cô từng lặng lẽ nhìn khóc một mình.

server.synopsis:
"My ex forced my hands into a dead Elder’s blood to frame me.
Desperate, I fled into a VIP club—and straight into Kael Draven. The ruthless rival Alpha marked me in a night of savage passion, then brutally rejected me the moment he learned I was a Blackwell. He thinks he left a disgraced, unnatural freak behind. But the two pink lines on my test just gave me the ultimate leverage over the monster who broke me."

can_update.story_title: The Smallest Warrior's Heart
can_update.folder_name: EXTENDED_Claudius, a Delta's fight for Love _Goodnovel - The Smallest Warrior's Heart

server.synopsis:
Caspian is a dominant Delta 3 — the rarest, most despised rank in his world. Smaller than other warriors, weaker than even the other Delta on his patrol team, he survives by keeping quiet, working twice as hard, and pretending the part of him that whimpers and purrs like an Omega doesn't exist. His uncle taught him to hate that part of himself before he was old enough to know better.

A year ago, on his very first patrol, Caspian found his fated mate. He held the man as he died from rogue wounds. He never even learned his name. The mate bond snapped before it could fully form, and Caspian has been fighting his way back to himself ever since — too far behind in training, too lonely in his cabin at the edge of pack territory, too afraid to hope that the Moon Goddess would ever grant him a second chance.

Then Theo arrives — the new training leader. An Omega with bright blue eyes, white hair he can never tame, muscles that should not belong on someone so beautiful, and a sense of humor that catches Caspian completely off guard. Theo learns Caspian's name when no one else has bothered. He pulls him into private morning lessons. He calls him "country boy" and "tiptoes" and watches him laugh for the first time in over a year. Caspian's wolf, Vex, finds his first friend in Theo's wolf, Frost. And Caspian finds something he never expected — a person who treats him like he matters.

The day at the lake changes everything. A near-fall, a near-kiss, a real one. Caspian tells Theo he loves him. Theo cries and pulls back. He hasn't met his fated mate yet. He won't be the one who loves Caspian for a year, then walks away the moment a stranger's bond pulls him out the door. Werewolves don't survive that kind of leaving twice.

When Theo announces he's taking a six-month traveling assignment, Caspian goes to find him alone on the dawn training field. He begs for whatever piece of Theo he can have. A month. A year. Anything. Theo refuses — gently, for Caspian's own protection — and as they say goodbye, another wolf comes barreling out of the trees toward them. A massive frantic figure named Bram, eyes flicking between them, pressing his great forehead against Theo's chest with an intimacy that suggests something Caspian doesn't yet understand.

Theo leaves. Caspian walks home. Vex stays curled in the back of his head.

A story about being the smallest in a world that values strength above all else. About loving someone you cannot keep. About the difference between mate-bond destiny and the human kind of choosing. About what it means to keep getting up when the Goddess seems to have forgotten you.

folder_values.push_content: Now I love my trainer. He refuses to claim me.

Then a job interview drags her old name and her felony record into the room, courtesy of Marcus Vale, the rich ex who put her in prison. Soaked and sick, she collapses into Tristan's arms. He wants to know who she really is.

folder_value.title: 🔥 Two months in his bed
folder_value.content: He belongs to my best friend. I can't stop going back.

can_update.folder_name: EXTENDED_Forbidden Zone_wp - His Brother Was My Husband

server.synopsis: At twenty, Nora Hayes is a London fashion student who has been married to Rafael Wescott for exactly one year — a transactional union no one at her school knows about. On their anniversary night his mistress takes Nora's place on the dance floor and Nora is left in the cold doorway. There she meets Crewe, Rafael's younger brother — an architect with a bandaged hand, a sharp grin, and a habit of taking whatever his brother has.

folder_values.push_title: 💍 On our anniversary he picked her
folder_values.push_content: His brother dared me to humiliate him. I might say yes.

He’s wrong. I’m the only one who can destroy his perfect control from the inside out.

Sold to the Marchettis to pay for a ceasefire, Serena is trapped with the man whose family murdered her grandfather. Nico thinks she is just a conquered plaything to humiliate and break. Let him enjoy his arrogant dominance. Let him become obsessed. She will let him own her, right up until she burns his empire to ashes.

Then his best friend Marlee filled every corner of it — missed dinners, ruined anniversaries, fake emergencies at the worst possible moments. Brynn kept telling herself she was imagining it. Until an anonymous text led her to Suite 612 at the Marlowe Hotel, where Marlee opened the door in a hotel robe and Tate ran out of explanations.

can_update.story_title: My Italian Boss and the Permission Slip
can_update.folder_name: EXTENDED_In Bed With Her Shithead Boss_GoodNovel - My Italian Boss and the Permission Slip

server.synopsis:
Mira flew home a day early to surprise her fiancé. She found him in their bed — with her cousin on top.
She didn't scream. She walked into her boss's office instead, drank his grappa straight from the bottom drawer, and signed a handwritten note on his notepad: permission to do whatever he wants with me.
Lorenzo Vitale read it aloud. Told her she was playing a dangerous game.
Then told her to kneel.

folder_values.push_title: 🏢 My fiancé slept with my cousin
folder_values.push_content: So I let my Italian boss take me on his desk.
folder_values.synopsis: Mira Castellano flew home to Milan a day early from a Paris market trip and walked up the staircase of her own Brera apartment to find her fiancé Bruno fucking her cousin Gemma in their bed. Twenty-six, Bergamo-born, the dry-witted executive assistant to the most insufferable creative director in Italian fashion — Lorenzo Vitale of Casa Vitale — Mira didn't scream. She poured Bruno a polite invitation to finish, walked out with her late father's wooden cricket mallet in one hand, and took a taxi to the only office she still wanted to be in. She drank Lorenzo's grappa straight out of the bottom drawer of his walnut desk. She told his mistress, on his desk phone, that flowers would be involved either way. And when Lorenzo himself arrived, removed the bottle from her hand, and sat beside her on the leather Chesterfield instead of firing her, Mira pulled at his silk tie and asked the one question Bruno had never let her answer for two years: was the broken thing me, or was it you? She wrote her answer on his notepad in his own gold fountain pen — *I, Mira Castellano, of sound mind, give permission for Lorenzo Vitale to fuck me, in any which way he so chooses* — and signed it. The Direttore read it aloud. He told her she was playing a very dangerous game. Then he told her to kneel. Lorenzo Vitale doesn't want her for one drunken evening on a Chesterfield in Cheongdam-grade real estate. He has been watching her for two years. He wants her properly, completely — and once he has her on her knees with her own ink drying on his desk, he is not in any hurry to let her go.

folder_value.title: 🏢 My fiancé slept with my cousin
folder_value.content: So I let my Italian boss take me on his desk.

server.synopsis: Eighteen-year-old Talia Quinn leaves Chicago for Columbia Law, carrying an unspoken ache about a missing mother. Her famous-designer father hands her a car. Her surrogate aunties hand her a soft landing. But the second Dean Sloane Marchetti walks into the welcome lecture and repeats Talia's full name aloud, like she is testing how it tastes, every careful plan Talia made for this fresh start starts to wobble in a way nothing else ever has.

folder_values.push_title: 🎓 The dean said my full name
folder_values.push_content: She's my law school dean. I'm eighteen. I can't stop wanting her.

can_update.story_title: They Bullied the Wrong Nerd
can_update.folder_name: EXTENDED_It All Started With A DARE_GoodNovel - They Bullied the Wrong Nerd

server.synopsis: Who says a fragile nerd can't bring a billionaire dynasty to its knees? Sage Mercer hid her lethal combat skills behind silver glasses and oversized hoodies. But when Ravenwood Academy's elite bullies push her too far, the masquerade ends. She publicly humbles the school's untouchable queen. Her violent retaliation was meant as a warning. Instead, it became an invitation to Asher Vance. The golden-boy heir watched her dismantle his clique's ego. Now, he doesn't want her compliance—he wants her.

folder_values.push_title: 🎓 They dumped lunch on my head
folder_values.push_content: I knocked their queen down. Now her billionaire boyfriend chases me.
folder_values.synopsis: EN (78 words): New girl Sage Mercer arrives at Seattle's elite Ravenwood Academy with a hot temper and a scholarship-kid chip on her shoulder. When queen bee Selene Bellamy dumps a lunch tray over her head, Sage knocks her down in front of the whole cafeteria. Now Selene wants her destroyed — and Selene's billionaire boyfriend, Asher Vance, can't stop watching the one girl at Ravenwood who hits back. It all started with a dare. It ends with a war. VI (96 words): Sage Mercer chuyển đến Ravenwood Academy — ngôi trường tư danh giá bậc nhất Seattle — mang theo cái đầu nóng và thân phận "dân thường" giữa đám con nhà tài phiệt. Khi nữ hoàng của trường Selene Bellamy đổ nguyên khay ăn lên đầu cô, Sage đánh trả ngay giữa căng-tin. Từ giây phút đó, Selene quyết tâm hủy hoại cô — còn bạn trai tỷ phú của Selene, Asher Vance, lại không thể rời mắt khỏi cô gái duy nhất ở Ravenwood dám đánh trả. Mọi chuyện bắt đầu từ một lời thách. Và kết thúc bằng một cuộc chiến.

server.push_title: 🎓 My math teacher gave me detention
server.push_content: She's a woman. I'm the cheer captain. Nobody knows my real life.
server.synopsis: Romy Hale is head cheerleader of Linden High and the picture of teenage perfection. The truth: she lives in a trailer park with her mother who works two jobs, hides her family's poverty from everyone, and carries the wound of a father she will not speak of. When she lands detention with the new math teacher, Ms. Ramsey, the older woman quietly sees through Romy's cheer-captain mask. A forbidden tenderness begins to form, one slow lesson at a time.

can_update.story_title: Sparks for the Starcrest Alpha
can_update.folder_name: EXTENDED_Maddox, The Broken Alpha _Gd - Sparks for the Starcrest Alpha

server.synopsis:
I, Beckett James Holloway, was supposed to be home three days ago. Now I'm rolling up to the pack house two days late, freshly eighteen, just back from six months of Alpha training, and one hundred percent ready to prank my big brother Caleb into next week.

Here's the thing nobody warned me about being a wolf. I have always been into guys. Always. I figured the Moon Goddess would hand me a male mate and we'd be done.

Then my twin sister's best friend Sienna walked into the room, took one look at me, and the world cracked open.

I tried to reject her. She tackled me to the floor before I could finish saying her name.

Six months later, I'm back, the full mate bond is wide open, and the second she leaps into my arms it hits me like every spark and zap in the universe at once. She's my mate, my Luna, my air. I'm not letting her go again.

But the rebuilt Starcrest Pack is waiting for an Alpha, and Caleb just told me the elders can run my ceremony tomorrow. Tomorrow. With my two dads in the front row, my brother's vampire mate cracking jokes, my baby nephew biting whoever holds him, and Sienna right there beside me as my Luna.

I'm Beckett. I'm a prankster, a goofball, and now an Alpha.

And she's the girl I never saw coming. Goddess help us both.

folder_values.push_content: The Goddess gave me my sister's best friend instead.

can_update.story_title: Hunted By The Alpha King
can_update.folder_name: EXTENDED_Mark Of The Alpha King_Gd - Hunted By The Alpha King

server.synopsis:
"""My mate is dead to me,"" the Alpha King declared, pressing Marvel naked against the wet earth.
Hunted through London’s fog-choked forests, Marvel thought her fated mate would be her sanctuary. Instead, he’s a monster with molten red eyes who wants her dead so he can marry another. For eighteen years, Marvel played the weak, sarcastic human servant. But as his suffocating dominance crushes her, her dormant wolf violently snaps awake. She will survive his hunt. And then, the King will beg."

folder_values.push_content: The mark on my neck means we both die tonight.

Her drunk stepfather counts down to her eighteenth birthday in bruises. The Pacific Northwest pack already knows what her mismatched eyes mean. Nova doesn't. Yet.

Her drunk stepfather counts down to her eighteenth birthday in bruises. The Pacific Northwest pack already knows what her mismatched eyes mean. Nova doesn't. Yet.

server.synopsis:
Eilidh has waited eighteen years for her wolf to come in. On the eve of her birthday — and after catching her boyfriend kissing the school's meanest she-wolf — she does something she will never live down: she kisses a stranger in the corridor to make him watch.
The stranger does not kiss back. He does not say a word. He just leaves.
By the next class, she learns his name: Professor Cailean of Glenshade. New instructor of Shifting and Combat at Strathfell Academy. The youngest Alpha on the council. The son of the legendary Roderick, who long ago was killed by his love for a Cealdran wolf.
Eilidh is Cealdran.
And on the night of her eighteenth, when Cailean walks into her father's house, his wolf will whisper one word that will undo every vow he has ever made.
Mate.

can_update.story_title: The Highland Alpha's Stolen Boy
can_update.folder_name: EXTENDED_Noah, an Omega's story _God - The Highland Alpha's Stolen Boy

server.synopsis:
When Highland alpha Thaddeus and his Glenarrow warriors raid the Blackthorn pack to depose its tyrant alpha, they expect to find the usual pack-house corruption. They do not expect what waits behind a hidden door in the alpha's own bedchamber.

Cael is eighteen but looks fifteen, half-starved as he is. He has been chained to a slab in the alpha's private "hurt-room" for years, hidden from the rest of the pack, broken in every way a person can be broken. When Thaddeus finds him — too thin, too quiet, too used to being hurt — something inside the alpha snaps and locks shut around the boy. *Mine to protect now,* his wolf says. *Family. Brother. Mine.*

Bringing Cael home to Glenarrow is the easy part. Healing him will be the work of years. He flinches at every hand. He thinks he's dreaming when he wakes up in a real bed for the first time in his life. He believes every alpha lies. He cannot say the word "mate" without panic taking him.

Thaddeus sets an alarm to check on him every two hours through the night. He learns the croon that breaks Cael's panic attacks. He hides his hand-lantern behind his back the first time Cael flinches at the shape of it. He invents a bedtime ritual out of shadow puppets — a rabbit, a bird that finally pulls the first smile out of Cael in goddess knows how long.

This is not a love story between them. This is the story of a man who decides one half-broken boy is going to be his to keep safe, and a boy who has to learn, slowly and painfully, that not every alpha is a fist.

The Blackthorn pack still has people in it who watched what happened to Cael and did nothing. Some of them are walking around Thaddeus's keep now, smiling, calling themselves saved. Marcus and Zendaya are holding the old pack-house with twenty rescued omegas under their care. The elders are coming. There are reckonings still to come.

But tonight Thaddeus lies on his window-bench, listens to Cael breathing in the bed across the room, and waits for him to sleep so that he can finally close his own eyes too.

folder_values.push_title: 🩸 They chained me inside the wall
folder_values.push_content: The Highland alpha broke down my hurt-room door tonight.

server.synopsis: The ruthless CEO of Ashe Broadcasting thinks his fake wife is just a destitute scapegoat. He's wrong. Dominic treats Celia with visceral disgust, unaware she was the virgin he claimed in a dark, blood-scented villa. Mourning her mother's death, Celia endures his humiliation just to secure her escape funds. She guards one secret fiercely: she is carrying his heir. When she vanishes, leaving only a blood-stained note, Dominic will finally realize he destroyed the only woman he loved.

folder_values.push_title: 🩸 Sold my night to save Mom
folder_values.push_content: She died anyway. He's forcing me to marry him.
folder_values.synopsis: EN (80 words): Celia Hart leaves prison for one night and wakes married to a stranger she never saw. The man is Dominic Ashe, ruthless chairman of Ashe Broadcasting, and his dying mother's only wish is grandchildren. Now Celia hides a secret pregnancy whose father she cannot name, dodges his vicious adopted-sister rival, and finds dangerous comfort in his playboy cousin Tobias. As enemies close in, the truth she fears most is what really happened the night her marriage began. VI (118 words): Celia Hart ra khỏi nhà tù chỉ một đêm và tỉnh dậy đã thành vợ một người lạ chưa từng thấy mặt. Đó là Dominic Ashe, chủ tịch lạnh lùng của tập đoàn truyền thông Ashe, và mong ước cuối đời của mẹ anh là một đứa cháu. Giờ Celia giấu giếm cái thai không rõ cha là ai, né cô em nuôi thù hận của Dominic, và tìm chút ấm áp nguy hiểm bên người em họ phóng khoáng của anh, Tobias. Khi kẻ thù siết vòng vây, điều cô sợ nhất là sự thật về đêm hôn nhân bắt đầu.

folder_value.title: 🩸 Sold my night to save Mom
folder_value.content: She died anyway. He's forcing me to marry him.

server.synopsis: Adrian Sterling is on his knees, begging his ex-wife to come back. He thought discarding Hazel for her manipulative stepsister was a smart move. He thought her "infertility" made her useless. He was wrong. Hazel manipulated him into a $6 million divorce, protecting the secret twin heirs growing inside her. Now, she stands safely in the arms of untouchable billionaire Pierce Kingsley. And Adrian is finally realizing the empire he destroyed was his own family.

folder_values.push_title: 👶 My husband calls me barren
folder_values.push_content: Tonight twins kicked. Six days until our secret divorce.
folder_values.synopsis: EN (76 words): Hazel's marriage to CEO Adrian Sterling is already over in every way that matters. He flaunts his mistress openly while his family treats Hazel like a servant. Then she learns she is carrying twins, and she tells no one. Instead she trades a faked infertility report for a six-million-dollar divorce payoff, quietly counting down the days until she can vanish. But a powerful stranger keeps appearing at her side, and some secrets refuse to stay buried. VI (115 words): Cuộc hôn nhân của Hazel với tổng giám đốc Adrian Sterling thực chất đã kết thúc từ lâu. Anh ta công khai qua lại với nhân tình, còn gia đình anh ta đối xử với cô như người hầu. Rồi cô phát hiện mình đang mang song thai, nhưng cô không nói với bất kỳ ai. Thay vào đó, cô dùng một tờ giấy khám vô sinh giả để đổi lấy sáu triệu đô la tiền ly hôn, lặng lẽ đếm ngược từng ngày cho đến khi có thể biến mất. Nhưng một người đàn ông quyền lực cứ liên tục xuất hiện bên cạnh cô, và có những bí mật không chịu nằm yên.

can_update.story_title: Twin Alphas, Forbidden Bond
can_update.folder_name: EXTENDED_River Pack and the Vampires _Goodnovel - Twin Alphas, Forbidden Bond

server.synopsis:
Dorian and Roman were never supposed to be mates. Two Alphas in training at the same boarding school, raised to lead packs of their own — the Goddess herself was not supposed to pair males together, much less two future Alphas. For years Roman pretended Dorian was just a friend, hiding the bond behind closed doors, kissing him in private rooms only to choke him into silence the morning after.

Now they are returning to school for one final visit, ready to walk away together for good. But coming back means facing every memory pressed into those walls — the late nights crying alone, the friends who saw nothing, the cafeteria laughter Dorian forced through tears. And it means facing the question Dorian has carried since the bond marked him: will Roman finally claim him out loud, in front of the friends they share? Or slip back into pretending they are nothing more than packmates?

When Roman kisses him in front of the whole cafeteria and announces him as the next Alpha of Hollow Creek Pack, Dorian thinks the worst is over. He is wrong. Some Alphas in training cannot stomach two males mated together. Their fists make that clear. Their boots make it clearer.

What they do not count on is the third in the bond — Caleb, the precious Omega waiting at home — or Theron, the angel uncle who can heal a broken body and pull two heartbroken Alphas across continents in a single hum of light. Dorian and Roman are going home to lead a massive pack, learn how to be Alphas together, and protect the gentle Omega they both love.

But the title hints at what is coming next. The river that gave Hollow Creek its name runs deep, and something older than the Goddess herself is starting to drink from it. Vampires. And they have been watching the wolf shifters for a very long time.

A first-person M/M paranormal romance about three mated Alphas, an angel in the family, and the bloodlines closing in.

server.synopsis: On her twenty-first birthday, Sienna Quinn breaks her own rules and goes home with a stunning blond stranger from a club called Hawthorne. Two weeks later she wakes up bloated, broke, and panicking, until her best friend says the one thing she's been avoiding: pregnant. The doctor confirms it. Sienna decides, alone, that she's keeping the baby. The catch: the father is Mason Hawthorne, and Mason is not a stranger she can walk away from.

can_update.story_title: The CEO Who Owns My Nights
can_update.folder_name: EXTENDED_Suck Me Dry _Goodnovel - The CEO Who Owns My Nights

server.synopsis:
Caspian Whitlow came to New York with big dreams and a duffel bag full of plans. Three years later, he's broke, living off his mom's monthly handout and one can of ravioli a day. His only friend is Niko, who runs a bar and keeps Caspian in casual shifts that barely cover the rent.

But the worst part of Caspian's life isn't the empty wallet — it's the man.

For weeks now, every time Caspian closes his eyes, the same stranger is there: tall, dark, deep-voiced, with a grin that promises ruin. The man from the shadows. Caspian's been waking up with bite marks on his neck, half-convinced he's losing his mind. Real men he tries to date never measure up. They feel hollow next to a fantasy.

When Niko mentions a tech support opening at his company — Yarrow & Vex Holdings — with brutal hours and a workaholic CEO who chews through assistants, Caspian almost says no. He has zero tech experience. The "boss's personal little bitch" job description should be his first warning.

Then he walks into the interview, and the man from his dreams strolls into the meeting room.

K. Voronov is real. He's the CEO. And one humiliating dismissal, one drunken email rant later, Caspian finds himself dragged back to the executive office for a forced apology and yet another encounter with the man who has been ruining his sleep for months.

What Caspian doesn't know — what he's about to discover the hard way — is that those weren't dreams. The bite marks weren't his imagination. K. Voronov has been in his bedroom. Watching. Waiting. Marking him.

And now Voronov wants more.

When Caspian wakes in the middle of the night with a hand around his throat and a low, familiar growl in his ear, he realises two terrifying things at once: the man he's been fantasising about is dangerously, possessively real — and the job offer from HR that hits his inbox the next morning isn't a coincidence.

The CEO who owns his nights is about to own his days too.

can_update.story_title: Bound to the Beast
can_update.folder_name: EXTENDED_THE LYCAN KING SECOND CHANCE MATE_Goodnovel - Bound to the Beast

server.synopsis:
Sirena Halloway has spent her whole life being second in her own home. Her stepmother despises her. Her half-sister Maris steals every friend, every prize, every scrap of her father's love. The one thing that was supposed to be hers alone was Brennan, the boyfriend she trusted with two years of her life. Then she opens a bedroom door and finds him tangled in Maris's sheets — and learns the betrayal has been going on the whole time.

Before she can even cry it out, a Lycan Beta rides through the gates of the Ironwood Pack with an order from the throne. The Sovereign Tribute is back. Both sisters are summoned to the Lycan King's Harem at Obsidian Hollow, ripped from their pack to serve the most feared wolves on the map. Maris and Brennan try to lie their way out by faking a mate-bond, but Sirena breaks the lie wide open, and forty-eight hours later the two of them are loaded into the same car, chained side by side on the road to a fortress neither of them will leave the same way.

King Dmitri lost his mate five years ago, and his wolf Vrael has never healed. He does not want a Luna. He wants the Tribute over with so the elders will stop praying. But on Sirena's first day inside the Harem walls, a scent pulls her down a forbidden hallway, through a half-open door — and into a pair of winter-blue eyes that lock on hers and refuse to let go. Inside her chest, her wolf Nyssa rips one word loose: **MATE.**

He was never supposed to find another. She was never supposed to be his. And the Harem is the worst place in the world to belong to the King.

When the ancient Lycans cross the Frostfang Range to buy his sister as a slave, Eivar trades his own freedom to follow her into the wolves' land. He does not know that Kaldraeth, the Lycan King whose Frenzy curse terrifies the realm, has felt a fated pull toward the small prince no one suspects is a girl.

can_update.story_title: The Alpha King's Twice-Rejected Slave
can_update.folder_name: EXTENDED_The Alpha King Slave_Goodnovel - The Alpha King's Twice-Rejected Slave

server.synopsis: At nineteen, Mira Sorin Petrescu was hauled up to the Black Pine Citadel as the Alpha King's bonded slave. Her old pack-Alpha Stefan rejected her once. Then Dragos Andrei Vlasin scented her through the bond, called her Kitten, and rejected her too. Iron pendant 508 at her throat. A cell in the undercroft. A King who killed his last mate. If twice-rejected mates die, no one's told Mira yet.

folder_values.push_title: 🩸 The Alpha King cracked my skull
folder_values.push_content: He killed his last mate. I'm next on his bed.

server.synopsis: For eighteen years, her own mother made her eat off the floor like a dog. Maren was the Iron Ridge pack's dirty secret—a half-human abomination covered in fading bruises and shattered ribs. While her sister Tessa reigned, Maren scrubbed bloodstains in the shadows. Until the territory's most ruthless Alpha, Ronan, stepped into her pack house. He didn't see a tainted servant. He smelled the intoxicating scent of his fated mate... and he was about to slaughter everyone.

server.synopsis: I thought the bruises and the broken bones were the worst the Black Pine Pack could give me. Not shifting made me a runt, an omega, a human in their eyes. The only soft thing in my life was Riker, my mate-to-be, the boy I'd loved since before either of us knew what marking meant. Then I caught him with my sister, his fangs already buried in her neck. The night I tried to run, the Lycans arrived. The King the world calls a beast — the one who's slaughtered thousands and ruled with a fist of iron — was searching for his fated mate. Turns out, being human was the smallest of my problems...

Their Third walks out of the van in a small blue dress. It is her.

server.synopsis: On a perfect Sunday morning, Naomi Hartley pulled a hidden ring from her husband's hoodie. It wasn't for her — and neither was the dark hair on his collar, or the secret booking he'd made at their old anniversary spot. By Friday her four-year-old had drawn the woman in red shoes who waved at her from the office curb. Naomi had no proof. Only a daughter who never lies, and a husband who suddenly takes his phone everywhere.

folder_values.push_title: 💍 I found another ring
folder_values.push_content: His hoodie pocket. My husband is proposing to someone else.

One handshake at her locker, one electric jolt, one whispered line: "And my name isn't Sweetheart." The Highland heir is hunting his own forgotten Shield. A rival Laird has been waiting a year to claim her first.

server.synopsis: Finn made one fatal mistake during his first week as an intern. He publicly roasted the platform's most profitable, toxic romance author, "Onyx." He didn't know Onyx was secretly his terrifying billionaire boss, Julian Vance. But Julian isn't firing him. Instead, the ruthless CEO is forcing Finn to sign a draconian NDA and act as his personal romance "Muse." Finn must teach this cold-hearted billionaire how to write about healthy love... or lose everything.

folder_values.push_content: He locked his office door and made me his muse.

can_update.story_title: Three Alphas and a Sealed Grimoire
can_update.folder_name: EXTENDED_The Forbidden Mate _Goodnovel - Three Alphas and a Sealed Grimoire

server.synopsis:
In the frost-bound werewolf realm of Isgaard, seventeen-year-old Soren is the only omega left alive. The rest of his kind were executed or driven into exile fifteen years ago, after the omega clan was charged with treason. The alphas spared him, for reasons no one will name, and made him a slave instead. He scrubs the marble halls of the Isgaard castle, sleeps on a scrap of cloth in a damp cellar, and survives on the leftovers he sneaks while washing dishes.

The kingdom is ruled by three royal alpha brothers — King Mikkel, Bjorn, and Halvor — who have spent years using Soren as a punching bag whenever their own lives get too heavy. Mikkel is twenty-five and still has not found the fated mate the Moon Goddess promised him. Bjorn is brutal. Halvor, the youngest, sometimes pulls the other two off before they can do worse. The day before Soren's execution for a crime he never committed, the brothers see him among the crowd of women fawning around them and, for the first time, none of them can quite look away.

Soren has only one friend in the kingdom — Annika Vinterhjelm, a chaotic young scientist whose latest invention is a stink bomb that may not actually work on the omega-populated enemy kingdom of Solrike. Annika has just found her own fated mate in sweet Espen Bjornsund, the lab director's son, and she is determined that Soren will find his too, even if it means smuggling him out to the matchmaking parties of the neutral city of Soldfjord.

But Soren has a secret of his own. In the abandoned castle library, where no one else ever sets foot, he has taught himself white magic from a book the imperial soldiers were too lazy to burn. He can heal his own wounds with a chant. He has begun to hear voices calling his name from between the shelves. And on this particular afternoon, the voices grow clear enough to lead him to a leather-bound notebook that lifts off its shelf on its own — the sealed grimoire of Drauvenir, once carried by the greatest magician Ulvheim ever produced, now whispering offers of power, vengeance, and freedom into Soren's mind.

Annika reveals what no one ever told him. Drauvenir's grimoire was used as a weapon against Isgaard fifteen years ago, in the war that killed Soren's father. Uncle Kjeld, the greatest mage of Isgaard, killed the wielder and locked the grimoire away so its evil could never spread again. And Soren — the slave the kingdom forgot — is the only one left who can let it out.

Tomorrow Soren is supposed to die. But the grimoire has other plans for him, and so do the three alphas who will not stop watching him.

folder_values.push_content: Tomorrow they execute me. One of them is my mate.

server.synopsis: Everyone in Cresthaven thought Clara was just Julian Sterling’s pathetic, impoverished wife. Everyone was wrong. For three years, she endured his freezing neglect and his blatant affair with her step-sister. But Clara was the secret Vance Corporation heiress. Tired of playing the victim, she slammed a divorce contract on his desk—citing his "defective equipment"—and walked out in killer stilettos. When he finds her draining his Centurion card on premium escorts, the cold CEO will finally beg.

server.push_title: 💔 My husband loves my sister instead
server.push_content: And tonight I learned my father bought me to cover an affair.
server.synopsis: Naomi Mercer waited up alone on her first anniversary. She found her husband Adrian drunk at a Boston bar, slurring the truth: he had only married her to stay close to her sister Camille, the heir of Mercer BioGroup. By dawn Naomi was inside her father's study asking the other question. Yes, he confirmed: she was the daughter of a long-buried affair. She did not cry. She did not beg. She quietly began.

folder_values.push_title: 💔 My husband loves my sister instead
folder_values.push_content: And tonight I learned my father bought me to cover an affair.
folder_values.synopsis: Naomi Mercer waited alone on her first anniversary. She found her husband drunk, confessing he had only married her to stay close to her sister. By dawn her father confirmed the rest: she was the daughter of a buried affair. She did not fall apart. She chose differently. In front of the family, she laid out her terms and made them stick. Now she has her grandmother's jewelry, the penthouse, and a pediatrics ward waiting. The door is closed. Cleanly.

server.synopsis: Princess Anaya is sent across the empires to marry a king she has never seen, only to find his widow on the throne and no king at all. Suriya, Queen of Sindhura, will not accept another bride, but she cannot bear another rejection. To save them both, Anaya offers a strange bargain: let Suriya rule as king, with Anaya as her bride. What begins as a court trick slowly turns into something neither queen knows how to name.

One stolen weekend, one party, one drink too many, and she wakes up naked in Roman Vance's bed. The school's worst player. The boy who never touches virgins. Two weeks later, she throws up on his shirt in the cafeteria — and that is when she realizes her secret is bigger than one night.

server.synopsis: When Ronan humiliated Lyanna by proposing to her stepsister, her family threw her away, selling her to a cursed, crippled Alpha. They thought she’d be dead within a week. They were wrong. Behind the terrifying mask and wolf-iron wheelchair, Cassander is a fiercely devoted mate. As Lyanna's dormant Omega powers awaken to shatter his dark battle-curses, the "weak" outcast and the "broken" War God will rise together—and make everyone who betrayed them beg for mercy.

folder_values.synopsis: The man Lyanna loves chooses her sister, and her father sells her the same day to a scarred Alpha rumored to be cursed. Cassander wants no bride; he has buried two. He sets her trial after trial. She meets every one. Behind the mask, a colder man begins, very quietly, to look at her differently. Then the new Luna catches his stepmother bleeding the pack accounts dry, and knives sharpen in the dark.

server.synopsis: On their silver anniversary, Marcus's young mistress storms the restaurant and slaps Addie in front of everyone. Addie doesn't cry. She doesn't shout. She hides the wound under quiet grace, sweeps up the broken vase, keeps living beside the man who shattered their twenty-five years. Marcus, afraid of losing her, begs, replants the garden, swears it meant nothing. Addie agrees to counseling, but hides folders in her tote and carries an older wound from age six.

Dane flies in from Italy on the next plane, cuts through the press at the hospital doors, and stays the night beside his husband. By breakfast he and Mara have a phone, a stolen lullaby video, and a plan to leak the truth before management can bury it.

server.synopsis: Forced to marry a comatose Wall Street titan, Avery Lawson was supposed to be a pawn. Instead, she got pregnant and vanished. Years later, Cole thinks the Wexford empire is his—until a genius child hacks his accounts, dismantling his inheritance. The boy’s father? Elliot Wexford, the terrifying, now-awakened CEO. Elliot is hunting for his runaway wife and the son he never knew existed. When he finds them, the entire financial world will burn.

server.synopsis: Nobody at Lumina Events knows I’m cheating on Troy. And they definitely don't know it's with our new Creative Director. Harper Sterling is predatory, demanding, and wears wire-rimmed glasses that make me forget my name. She acts like a tyrant in the boardroom, tearing apart my campaigns. But the second she locks her office door, she turns me into her prey. I thought I was straight. But Harper is determined to prove me wrong, whatever the cost.

server.synopsis: Eighteen-year-old Valentina Russo takes a waitress job at a high-end mafia club to cover her father's hospital bills. Owner Adrian Ivanov, the city's youngest Russian Don, mistakes her for a stripper and orders her to undress. The misunderstanding clears, but Adrian's interest does not. That night, Valentina witnesses an alley execution and is pistol-whipped unconscious. She wakes in the home of two strangers who claim a coincidence brought them. The Bratva is closer than she realizes.

Fire answers her bare hands, the Moon Goddess names her a soldier, and the wolf she calls forth burns black.

Cast out as a rogue, she still stopped to save a dying stranger, and the Ironpeak Pack chained her to a stake for it. Now she wakes in a strange bed, healed, four months gone. The blue-eyed alpha at her side buried his own Luna years ago. He has been talking to her ever since.

all_match.story_title: The Alpha Who Bought Me With An Alliance
all_match.folder_name: DONE_False Expectations_wp - The Alpha Who Bought Me With An Alliance

server.push_content: I share his packhouse with the woman he actually loves.
server.synopsis: Rowena Hale runs the finances of a small, broke pack. When the future Werewolf King Caspian Vossberg walks in with a scent-masking potion and a price, her father trades her for an alliance. Caspian locks her in his packhouse, hides her from his mistress, and writes her a list of rules. Then a kind doctor offers her a way out — and the Alpha drags her into a moonlit ritual that tastes like a real claim.

server.push_content: I confessed twice. Both times he told me to wait.

Twice she confessed; twice he told her to prove herself first and wait. So she stopped chasing him and became someone new. But the day he saw another boy holding her hand, the cold, careful Bianchi heir finally broke.

Then an anonymous note warns her that someone is secretly profiting from it all.

When a forced Tinctures partnership puts them at the same library bench, Aren's loyal friends push back hard. As corridor whispers turn into shoves, both boys must decide whether anything quieter than enmity can survive their Final Year — and whose side they will end up on.

Four years later she returns to her old pack as a masked sniper, and the alpha who threw her away has no idea the woman saving his life is the omega he killed inside.

Twenty-one years later he hunts the dark-magic monsters that hunt his kind, mateless, heartless, fucking proud of it. folder_values.synopsis: Disgraced and exiled with another man's child, Nora Forsythe is married off to Captain Edmund Thornliffe, the suitor she once betrayed. He gives her his name, a fine house by the Welsh sea, and nothing else. He will not love her, will not touch her, and means to leave her behind while he lives in London. But cold civility cannot hide a wound this deep, and one country ball begins to crack his guarded heart.

server.push_title: 🐺 He danced with her all night
server.push_content: At midnight his teeth sank into my neck instead.
server.synopsis: Weeks after her true mate rejected her, Renya is shipped to the palace with forty-six other rejected females, expected to lose. The crown's new heir, King Theron, is no ordinary Alpha. Prophecy says he was born more wolf than man, fated to no one, despised by the Moon Goddess herself. He dances all night with another woman. Then, at midnight, his canines sink into Renya's neck instead.

server.push_content: So why is a stranger asking if I ever saw the body?
server.synopsis: Derya buried her husband, army Major Emir Kuzey, with a flag over an empty box. Pregnant and broken, she moves back into the family mansion, where grief blurs into memory. But Emir left a coded letter and a hidden key, and a watcher haunts her gate. Emir is alive, drugged in a basement, betting everything on the wife everyone underestimates. When a stranger asks if she ever saw the body, Derya turns to stone.

Four years later Adrian returns as a star designer — with a genius son no one knew about. Then the three-year-old slips a resume to Lucas Thorne, the city's richest man. The DNA test confirms the impossible. Lucas wants his son back, and he hasn't even met the boy's other father yet.

She runs for the sea, ready to drown them both. A grey-eyed mafia boss named Dragan drags her out by the hair. Her father owes him something far worse than money, and Verity is the collateral. Dragan makes her his maid, and his eyes never leave her.

all_match.story_title: Pregnant by the Bratva King
all_match.folder_name: DONE_Mafia_wp - Pregnant by the Bratva King

server.push_content: I'm carrying the baby of the most dangerous man alive.
server.synopsis: Nadia Cole is a hardworking nurse who only wanted one wild night at a yacht party. She gets it — with a tall, tattooed stranger who calls himself Dmitri and walks away before she even learns his last name. A month later, two pink lines change everything. When morning sickness gives her away at work, Nadia realizes she is carrying the baby of a man she cannot find. She tracks Dmitri to the harbour, only to discover the truth the bartender tried to warn her about: he is no ordinary businessman. He is the Bratva boss who owns an entire gated city, and he does not believe the child is his. Dmitri takes her behind his walls and refuses to let her leave until a test proves what she already knows. Trapped in his cold black house, fighting him at every turn, Nadia uncovers a dusty nursery built for a woman who came before her — and feels the dangerous pull of the man who keeps her captive. He claims he only wants proof. So why does he climb into her bed, rest his hand on her growing belly, and hold her until the fight drains out of her? The result comes back. The baby is his. And now Nadia is bound to the most powerful, most ruthless man she has ever met — a man who is starting to look at her like she might be the one thing he cannot afford to lose.

The wedding is a sham, her groom a wall of ice, and the Vale mansion hides a locked blue door no one will open. Then Sienna finds the paintings Dominic buried, and the woman with his eyes.

all_match.story_title: The Alpha King I Rejected
all_match.folder_name: DONE_Queen of the Wolves_wp - The Alpha King I Rejected

server.push_content: Tonight his guards dragged me back. He's the Alpha King.
server.synopsis: Two years ago Wren Calloway rejected her own mate and ran. Now a rogue attack drags her back to the Royal Pack, straight before Tobias Hawkins, the Alpha King she walked away from. He has not accepted the rejection, but he will not forgive it either. To stay near him she must survive the acceptation trials and hide the silver bloodline that makes her hunted. Then a message written in fresh blood promises someone is coming for them both.

On his seventeenth birthday the Moon Goddess finally gives him a mate, and it is Renley, the Alpha girl who was once his best friend. In front of the whole pack, she rejects him. The bond shatters. But the rejection breaks something open in his family too.

He regrets everything and is fighting to win her back. But the bond that broke her once is no reason to forgive.

As her wolf finally wakes and old secrets about her parents surface, Marigold feels the slow pull of a bond she is afraid to trust.

Her mate is somewhere in the crowd, and Selene has already chosen to run.

He told himself it was strictly business. He was already wrong.

Renata Voss carries her own scars and a man she swore never to trust again. Dorian wants her like he wants air. But the demons he hides have a name, and they are coming for her too.

So why did she faint straight into his arms, and why can't he stop thinking about her green-hazel eyes?

Then the moon goddess sends him a second chance: an Iraq combat veteran with PTSD bad enough to scare off every caregiver but his foster sister. Maddox is human. Maddox is straight. And Donovan cannot lose another mate.

server.push_content: My fated Alpha threw me on the floor and dragged my mom away.
server.synopsis: Iyla Brennan meets her fated mate — and Alpha Roan slams the door on her, drags her mother to the dungeon, and refuses to let her go. Under his cruelty, she finds shelter in the Beta who chose to protect her, Keane Hollister. Every time Roan cheats, the bond burns through her body. Tonight she rejects him — and learns what love looks like in the arms of the man who never stopped reaching for her.

all_match.story_title: The Lycan King's Daughter
all_match.folder_name: DONE_The Alpha King Daughter_Goodnovel - The Lycan King's Daughter

server.push_title: 👑 My father hired me a bodyguard
server.push_content: He wears a mask and only says one word. No.
server.synopsis:
Eloise Ravenscar is the only daughter of the Lycan King — and the last person who ever wanted a bodyguard following her around Ravenscar Hall.

Then her father assigns her one anyway.

His name is Viktor. He is massive, scarred, gloved, and silent. A black mask hides the lower half of his face. Tattoos run down his arms. His obsidian eyes flicker with gold the moment Eloise gets too close, and he answers every question she asks him with a single word: *No.*

The first time Eloise reaches for the mask, he catches her wrist mid-air, faster than any Lycan she's ever met. The second time, he says, "Don't touch." The third time, he breaks down her bathing-chamber door in nothing but a black tank-top and shorts, and the gold in his eyes does not fade.

Three weeks until her birthday ball. Three weeks until rival Alphas arrive at the Hall to win her over for treaty's sake — mate-bond or not, they'll come for her hand. Her uncle warns her people will do whatever they must for power. Her father refuses to sell her. Her mother — slain by a rogue while shielding her — cannot warn her at all.

And the only thing Eloise knows for certain is that her wolf, Mira, will not stop purring whenever Viktor walks into the room.

She came up with a plan: if anger doesn't work, temptation will.

She forgot to plan for the moment Viktor finally opened his mouth and said something other than *No*.

Worst deal ever. Or maybe the best.

server.push_title: 💍 I'm his wife. He paid me.
server.push_content: My husband paid me to vanish. He had no idea who I was.
server.synopsis: EN (79 words): Three years ago, Damien Sterling signed a marriage certificate to a woman he had never met, then flew straight to Europe. He's home now to divorce her. One drugged drink at a Belmont party drops him into the wrong hotel room with a stranger whose name he doesn't catch. The next morning he pays her to vanish — and she walks out smiling, because she has just spent the night with her own husband, and he has no idea. VI (118 từ): Ba năm trước, Damien Sterling đã ký giấy kết hôn với một người phụ nữ anh chưa từng gặp, rồi lập tức bay sang châu Âu. Bây giờ anh trở về để ly hôn. Một ly rượu bị pha thuốc tại bữa tiệc của khách sạn Belmont đẩy anh nhầm phòng, nhầm giường, cùng một người lạ mà anh không kịp nhớ tên. Sáng hôm sau anh đưa cô một xấp tiền và bảo cô biến mất — còn cô thì mỉm cười bước ra cửa, vì cô vừa qua đêm với chính chồng hợp pháp của mình, và anh ta hoàn toàn không hay biết.

Then his family hires her best friend's restaurant for a kids' party, and Marcus Vaughn will not stop watching her. By sundown, he corners her in the alley and asks for one date.

all_match.story_title: The Mate Who Came Back from the Rogues
all_match.folder_name: DONE_The Rejection (OLD VERSION)_wp - The Mate Who Came Back from the Rogues

server.push_content: I came home with another Alpha's love on my mouth.
server.synopsis: **The Mate Who Came Back from the Rogues** **Logline (one line):** Three years after the Alpha she was promised to rejected her at fourteen, Wren walks back into his pack with a buried second love, a rogue's name on her tongue, and absolutely no plan to forgive him. **Hook (BedReads micro-blurb, 80-100 words):** Caden rejected me when we were fourteen. I ran. I found another pack, another Alpha — Roman — and he loved me the way Caden should have. Then the rogues came. They didn't kill Roman. They took him. So I came back to the only home I had left, walked up to Caden's door, and made him remember exactly what he threw away. He thinks he gets a second chance. He doesn't know about Roman yet. He doesn't know who's hunting me. He's about to. **Tone:** First-person teen-Wattpad, ESL-friendly, snarky-soft, modern werewolf pack romance. Slow-burn second-chance with a parallel lost-love mystery. PG-13 register, light steam. **Comps:** "Rejected My Alpha Picked Her Mark"; "The Captain He Threw Away"; "How To Survive Your Mate's Rejection" (all DONE in the catalogue) — same lane: female lead returns after rejection, parallel love interest, rogue antagonist. **Trope stack:** Rejected mate / Second chance / Returning protagonist / Hidden grief / Rogue antagonist / Mate bond reconnect / Best-friend reunion / Mated-pair flashback. **Heat:** Low-to-medium (kissing, body awareness, no explicit on-page in this batch). **Promise to reader (this batch — chapters 1–8):** By chapter 8 the reader knows that (a) the mate bond between Wren and Caden is real and openly named, (b) Caden has the pack but not Wren's forgiveness, (c) Roman exists and is still alive somewhere in the rogues' hands, (d) Garrick Vale, the rogue who killed Wren's parents, is the antagonist driving the larger arc. **Why a reader will reread:** the second-chance dynamic with Caden gives daily comfort, the unresolved Roman thread gives weekly tension, and Wren's voice — sharp, self-contradicting, ESL-accessible — is the kind of POV BedReads readers re-open at lunch.

all_match.folder_name: DONE_The Richest Billionaire is My Accidental Husband_max 1477_complete_nw - I Drew the Billionaire Who Swore to Bury Me

server.push_content: I drew the man who vowed to bury his bride—then he signed.
server.synopsis: When Britain's marriage law forces every unwed graduate into a state lottery, Evora Marsh expects a rotten apple. Instead, the system hands her the one name no woman dares to draw: Julian Ashcroft, the richest man in the country and the number-one commitment-phobe who once vowed to bury anyone matched with him. His lawyer arrives with a million-pound bribe and a single demand — step aside for Seraphina Vane, the nation's beloved "recovered heiress." What no one knows is that Seraphina is a lie. Evora is the real lost daughter of the Holloway dynasty, swapped at birth and raised on a poor fisherman's island. The girl they call beneath the national treasure is secretly the only true heiress in the room. And when Julian storms in to crush the fisherman's daughter who dared to draw him, he grips her chin, looks into the face that has haunted his dreams for years — and signs the marriage papers on the spot. She thought it was the worst luck of her life. She has no idea the accident just married her to the one man who never forgot her.

folder_values.push_title: 🐺 They found my lover's body
folder_values.push_content: I went to meet his killer. The voice wasn't human.
folder_values.synopsis: Cara found her lover on the floor, his throat torn open, no animal print left behind. Then a stranger phoned. He knew the killer's name, and his voice carried a growl no human throat could make. He led her to a ruined house on a dead-end lane, unlocked a door, and showed her the chained thing inside. It had gold eyes and the dead man's face. Some packs hunt in the dark, and now they have her scent.

all_match.story_title: The Heiress Who Married Her One-Night Stand
all_match.folder_name: DONE_The Witch CEO is NOT a Demoness_wp - The Heiress Who Married Her One-Night Stand

server.push_content: He moved in. Won't leave. He's my company's rival heir.
server.synopsis: Selene Kassar runs her grandfather's firm with an iron hand — Witch, Demoness, Asura, the cold CEO everyone fears. When Grandpa gives her seven days to choose a husband, she sneaks into a club for one wild night before her freedom ends. She wakes up in bed beside a stranger she cannot remember. He refuses to leave. He moves into her apartment. And the man who has stolen her bed may be the very heir she has sworn to destroy.

all_match.story_title: The Sloane Heir His Wife Couldn't Bear
all_match.folder_name: DONE_The dent in our vows_wp - The Sloane Heir His Wife Couldn't Bear

server.push_title: 💍 My husband won't get me pregnant
server.push_content: His stepmother just told me why. I'm not the first.
server.synopsis: EN (78 words): Wren Sloane married Knox like a fairytale, but a year in he still won't get her pregnant and quietly keeps her on the pill. His cold stepmother corners her at a Boston gala and warns she will be replaced. When Wren confronts him, Knox drives to the family estate at dawn and names the secret — the same condition that killed his mother in labor will kill her too. The vows are warm and already cracked. VI (118 words): Wren Sloane cưới Knox như cổ tích, nhưng đã một năm trôi qua mà anh vẫn không cho cô mang thai và lặng lẽ bắt cô uống thuốc tránh thai mỗi tháng. Mẹ kế lạnh lùng của Knox dồn cô vào góc tại một buổi gala từ thiện ở Boston, cười và nói rằng anh đang giấu điều gì đó, rằng một cô gái như cô sẽ sớm bị thay thế. Khi Wren chất vấn, Knox lái xe đến nhà gia đình lúc rạng sáng và cuối cùng gọi tên bí mật — căn bệnh đã giết mẹ ruột anh trong khi sinh sẽ giết cô. Vivienne muốn cháu nội, bố muốn câu trả lời, còn Wren muốn một đứa con mà Knox sẽ không bao giờ cho phép. Lời thề còn ấm và đã rạn.

server.push_title: 🥀 My co-star is falling for me
server.push_content: She doesn't know my father is paying her to do it.
server.synopsis: Maya Beckford is twenty, half-British, half-Filipina, and the most-watched young lead in Manila. When she signs on to a streaming GL series without telling her father, Edward quietly hires her co-lead — Liana Soriano, an actress carrying a sick mother and a debt she cannot outrun — to keep her safe on set, in the car, and at every event she walks into. Over five chapters the protector becomes the partner.

server.push_title: 💍 They married me to a cripple
server.push_content: But only I know his legs can still be healed.
server.synopsis: Sold off in her pampered sister's place, Yoon Da-eun marries the disgraced Seo heir, a cold man in a wheelchair the whole city writes off as a cripple. Everyone thinks she is a gold-digger who will drown in his ruin. They are wrong. Da-eun is a hidden rehabilitation prodigy, and one glance tells her his legs can be healed and that his own family doctor is keeping him broken on purpose. The woman they pity will rebuild an empire.

But when Caleb appears on the sidewalk begging for one more chance, every promise they inked into their skin comes rushing back, and Skylar must decide whether love is worth the wreckage.

all_match.story_title: The Pure-White Luna Glenmara Forgot
all_match.folder_name: DONE_True Luna_Goodnovel - The Pure-White Luna Glenmara Forgot

server.push_content: My Alpha is the man I've loved since my parents died.
server.synopsis:
Iona has spent eight years missing the parents the rogues took from her on the night her brother's best friend, Cailean, became Alpha of Glenmara Pack overnight. She is small for a wolf, plain for a girl, and certain of one thing: tomorrow she turns eighteen, meets her wolf, and finds the mate the Moon Goddess picked for her. Maybe it will be Niall, the patrol wolf who has loved her since they were kids. Maybe she will finally belong somewhere again.

The shift takes her under the Standing Stones, and it changes everything. Iona's wolf walks out of the moonlight pure white from nose to tail — a thing the pack has never seen, a thing her brother, the Beta, has no name for. The boy she hoped would be her mate stares back without sparks. There is no bond there, no fated pull, only a soft crack inside her chest. Then her wolf, Brina, says the words that bury her: *We are not his. We belong to somebody else.*

Brina knows who. Brina will not tell.

Before Iona can fight the answer out of her own wolf, a fist hits the front door in the dead of night, hard enough to wake the whole house — and the man on the other side will know exactly what a pure-white Luna is worth, even if Glenmara never has.

A Highland-Celtic werewolf romance about an orphan girl who walks into her first shift expecting a soft answer and walks out of it carrying a prophecy nobody in her pack is ready to hear.

As she is dragged into being Luna of the Ironpine pack, the boy she actually loves walks back into her life from the dead.
