server.push_content: Now we share a bed, a name, and total silence.
server.synopsis: EN (79 words): Tessa and Cole were best friends since childhood. Then one drunk night put them in the same bed, and a stranger's camera put the photos in front of both families. To save the companies, and a father with a failing heart, they were forced to marry. Now they share an apartment, a bed, and nothing but cold silence. She lost her best friend the day she gained a husband. Neither of them will admit they still want the other. VI (97 words): Tessa và Cole là bạn thân từ thuở nhỏ. Rồi một đêm say đưa cả hai lên chung một chiếc giường, và máy ảnh của một kẻ lạ đặt những tấm hình ấy trước mặt hai gia đình. Để cứu hai công ty, và một người cha có trái tim yếu, họ bị ép phải kết hôn. Giờ đây họ chung một căn hộ, chung một chiếc giường, và chẳng còn gì ngoài sự im lặng lạnh lùng. Cô mất người bạn thân nhất vào đúng ngày cô có một người chồng. Không ai chịu thừa nhận mình vẫn còn muốn người kia.

He has imprinted on her. But she is the Alpha's daughter now, and he has been ordered to say nothing.

server.push_content: Drugged and jilted at my wedding, I wed a stranger hiding everything.
server.synopsis: Cora Hale is drugged and framed by her half-sister on her wedding day, then cast out by the father and fiance who never believed her. Barely conscious, she marries a quiet stranger at City Hall, sure he is only a chauffeur, not guessing how powerful he truly is. server.push_content: He's with my cousin. I'm climbing the rooftop in my veil.
server.synopsis: Wren Halloran stood alone at her wedding in a pearl-trimmed gown. The boy from the next house never arrived. Theo Coyle's phone call ended with one sentence: "It just won't be with you." Wren walked out into a thunderstorm in her bridal dress and into the headlights of a truck. Hours later her family stood over a hospital bed begging her to wake. Three days later they lowered her coffin into the family plot.

server.push_content: Now I'm plotting with the omega his Luna threw away.
server.synopsis: Under the full moon, Wren heard her own wolf name Lior as her mate. Then the future Alpha claimed Calla instead, and an omega learned exactly what rejection costs. Six months later, a violent new patient turns up at the pack hospital: Rourke, the omega Calla threw away. Two rejects, one bitter plan. Win back the mates who discarded them, no matter the price. But second chance bonds do not ask permission, and Wren is already feeling the pull.

server.push_title: 🌙 They said I had no wolf
server.push_content: Tonight the pack found out what was sleeping inside me.
server.synopsis: Selene has been the disgrace of the Ashen Hollow Pack since the night she was born and her mother died. Platinum-haired, mismatched-eyed, wolf-less at twelve, hated by a Beta father who cannot look at her, she has only her nanny, the rogue who saved her once, and the silent stares of the Alpha-in-line. On the night she turns eighteen, an army of rogues breaks the borders, and the wolf she never had finally rises in white fire.

server.push_content: She lost her mate, her family, her memory. Then a wolf found her.
server.synopsis: On Nerina Hollis's eighteenth birthday, her fated Alpha Korbin Vance rejected her in front of their pack, calling her ugly, fat, and worthless. Her own brother Killian laughed. Nerina ran. Six hours later, Roan, Alpha of Cedar Hollow, found her sobbing by a river and took her in. The pack loves her. A five-year-old crowned her Cinderella. The mate bond she lost? It might be replacing itself with a stronger one.

server.push_title: 👑 I died as his dirty secret
server.push_content: Now I'm back, richer than the woman who ordered my acid attack.
server.synopsis: Sienna died in an alley, framed as a stalker fan, her face burned on her rival's orders. Then she wakes two days before her boyfriend's betrayal, every memory intact. This time the trillion-dollar heiress hiding behind a fast-food apron lets the affair play out, collects the proof, and calls her grandfather home. Dorian wants her waiting. Calista wants her dead. Neither knows whose name the whole city is about to relearn.

One reckless night, she wakes up beside Kabir, her dull fiance's gorgeous best friend, with no memory and a secret that could ruin everything. Now she's plotting a fake escape from her own wedding while morning sickness whispers that her real problem is only beginning. Some accidents change your whole life.

server.push_title: 👶 My new lecturer hid a secret
server.push_content: One drunken night gave us three children. I never knew.
server.synopsis: Adrian Hale is a third-year finance student in London who quietly funds himself by writing online novels. When his roommates pass around a photo of the university's gorgeous new lecturer, Adrian freezes: she is the woman he spent one drunken night with a year ago. The next morning they come face to face again at the freshers' welcome, and she pulls him aside to tell him the truth. She has secretly given birth to his triplets and raised them alone. The moment Adrian accepts the children, a sealed clause in his late grandfather's will springs to life. The Ashworth Trust was built to test whether the dynasty's hidden heir could first prove himself as a father, and it begins releasing money, resources, and rare opportunities each time Adrian truly cares for Noah, Emma, and Sophie. Suddenly able to provide, he rents a home near campus, brings in help, and sets out to win back the trust of the woman who carried everything on her own. What follows is a warm story of an absent father who chooses to stay, a guarded mother slowly letting herself hope again, and three small children who turn a broke-looking student into the most devoted dad in London.

No one knows the plain, despised girl is Seoul's vanished Golden Hands. They will learn.

server.push_content: But the failure they pitied can stop a man with one finger.
server.synopsis: Everyone says Han Soo-wan is a failure, a beautiful nobody who flunked every exam and drowns in debt. They are wrong. Buried by her own family, forced to be her brother's ghostwriter, she is a hidden genius who can stop a man with one touch. Now she is the contract wife of cold chaebol heir Seo Ji-hwan and stepmother to his wild son. The day she stops hiding, the city will never recover.

server.push_title: 🏢 The Italian billionaire called me Bella
server.push_content: I'm still a virgin. Twelve white roses arrived this morning.
server.synopsis: Hadley Carrow is twenty-four, a Virginia transplant styling at a New York magazine, and still a virgin. Then Dario Moretti walks into her studio for a cover shoot — Italian-Korean, thirty-two, worth forty-five billion, and the first man who has ever called her Bella like she already belonged to him. He sends roses to her office. He kisses her against her own elevator wall. And when fate drops her into his restaurant, he asks for another chance.
